mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in retail sales signals improving household cash-flow demand and near-term revenue expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS vintage value for 2018-07-01 was 507533 as known by 2018-08-15
failure_condition: Reject if the top tercile of 3-month RSAFS momentum does not outperform the bottom tercile in 20-day forward S&P 500 returns over at least 60% of 3-year walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate moves materially above its trailing trend, the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows rises and liquidity conditions tighten, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above its 12-month moving average by more than 0.25pp
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS vintage value for 2018-07-01 was 1.91 as known by 2018-08-15
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 60-day S&P 500 returns more than 55% of the time or if their mean 60-day return is not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: A rising unemployment rate from a low base signals labor-market deterioration and weakening aggregate income, reducing earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises more than 0.3pp over 3 months after being below its 12-month average
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE vintage value for 2018-07-01 was 3.9 as known by 2018-08-15
failure_condition: Reject if triggered instances are followed by nonnegative 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if the signal has negative-return precision below the unconditional negative-return base rate.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer inflation combined with a rising policy rate signals an inflation-fighting tightening regime that compresses equity multiples, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized change exceeds its 12-month change and FEDFUNDS increases over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL vintage value for 2018-07-01 was 251.286 and FEDFUNDS was 1.91
failure_condition: Reject if the joint condition does not underperform either single-series condition, or if triggered 20-day S&P 500 returns are positive in more than 55% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Positive industrial production momentum signals expanding real output and operating leverage in cyclical sectors, raising expected earnings and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO vintage value for 2018-07-01 was 107.9989 as known by 2018-08-15
failure_condition: Reject if 60-day forward returns following positive 3-month INDPRO momentum are not higher than returns following negative momentum in at least 60% of rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in housing starts signals weakening rate-sensitive demand and a slowing construction multiplier, reducing future earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its 12-month moving average by more than 10%
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST vintage value for 2018-06-01 was 1173 as known by 2018-08-15
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have average 60-day S&P 500 returns equal to or above the unconditional average, or if drawdown incidence is not elevated versus baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll growth combined with stable or falling unemployment signals broad labor-income expansion without slack deterioration, supporting consumption and earnings and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month change is positive and UNRATE 3-month change is less than or equal to 0pp
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS vintage value for 2018-07-01 was 149128 and UNRATE was 3.9
failure_condition: Reject if the joint labor-strength condition does not deliver higher 20-day returns than either PAYEMS-only strength or UNRATE-only stability in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly consumer-price acceleration above a high threshold forces short-horizon inflation-risk repricing in rates and equity multiples, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL vintage value for 2018-07-01 was 251.286 as known by 2018-08-15
failure_condition: Reject if triggered CPI acceleration dates are followed by positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or have no lower mean return than non-triggered dates.
